suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-3 EIP-8037 consensus bugs and hash divergence resolution
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #74 reported EVM fuzzing causing hash mismatches across implementations, with CREATE/CALL operations breaking BAL hash divergence in Nimbus/Reth. DevNet-3 cannot progress until these critical consensus bugs are resolved.

suggestions.topic: PTC committee caching decision for ePBS
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDT #73 with 'this week' deadline (passed). ACDT #74 mentioned Alpha4 with PTC lookahead for epbs-devnet-1, but no explicit decision was documented. This blocks attestation testing.
ACDT #74 showed Teku cannot sync or propose, exits non-functional. Need status update on fixes and determine readiness for epbs-devnet-1 launch with Alpha4/PTC lookahead.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-3 SFI eligibility after stability window
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #74 decided bal-devnet-3 EIPs eligible for SFI one week after stability. If devnet-3 achieves stability this week, EIPs 7708, 7778, 7843, 8024 could be discussed (though final decision at ACD).
ACDT #74 reported partial cells spec finalized but Prysm bugs blocking progress. Testnet rollout planned once clients optimistic. Need status on Prysm fixes and validator subset rollout timeline.

suggestions.topic: perf-devnet-3 sync issues and 5 Gigagas testing results
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #73 reported Reth/Nethermind/Besu sync issues and OOM problems at 5 Gigagas. ACDT #74 showed bal-devnet-2 achieving 100% participation. Need updates on whether sync/memory issues are resolved.

suggestions.topic: SSZ engine API implementation status and ACD discussion timing
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #73 deferred final approval to ACD. Giulio's proof-of-concept implemented across multiple clients. If implementation progresses, determine when to bring to ACD for formal decision.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 complexity concerns and DevNet-4 scope discussion
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #73 revealed deep implementation concerns (Marius: 'deeply complex', Ben: 'tendrils affecting everything'). With DevNet-3 bugs ongoing and dynamic version deferred to DevNet-4, discuss whether 8037 scope should be reconsidered.
